sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39904" key="e)pikrou/stion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-κρούστιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a surgical instrument, perh. <sense id="n39904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slasher, Hermes</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.282</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
